title: Copper Beacons
description: Use copper blocks for your beacon base
body:
> # Note - This pack has been merged into [PurpurPacks](https://modrinth.com/user/PurpurMC/datapacks), and any future development will be done on that pack - [Copper Beacon Base Pack Link](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpacks-copper-block-beacon-base)

Allows players to use copper blocks as a beacon base

Viable blocks are

`copper_block`
`exposed_copper`
`weathered_copper`
`oxidized_copper`
`waxed_copper_block`
`waxed_exposed_copper`
`waxed_weathered_copper`
`waxed_oxidized_copper`

Beacon will now also accept a copper ingot as a payment item
